name: Coconut Mismo
title: Coconut Mismo Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Coconut Mismo Cocktail | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A simple highball cocktail of BACARDÍ Coconut rum and soda water served over ice and finished with lime.
marketing_description: BACARDÍ Coconut gives the Mismo a smooth tropical kick.

ingredients.name: ice
ingredients.amount: Fill a tall highball glass with cubed ice.

steps: Fill a tall highball glass with cubed ice.
Add the soda water and stir well before serving.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Coconut Mismo 50 ml BACARDÍ Coconut rum 150 ml soda water ... Fill a tall highball glass with cubed ice. Pour in the BACARDÍ Coconut. Add the soda water and stir well before serving. Garnish with a lime wedge.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Coconut Mismo Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
